name: com.rockrabbit.spark-tools-mcp
description: MCP tool surface for the Spark Game Creation Framework. Adds spark_* tools (create_entry, batch_create_from_template, generate_variations, schema, validate_database, ...) to the Unity MCP server so Claude can author and batch-edit Spark database entries directly. Requires Unity MCP (com.coplaydev.unity-mcp) and the Spark framework.
